Featured Work

Projects That Move The Needle

Detailed case studies showcasing end-to-end ownership across product strategy, execution, and measurable business outcomes.

Cloudflare
Enterprise Growth: $150M+ Pipeline Acceleration
Led the Salesforce Sales Cloud product roadmap that unlocked $150M+ in annual pipeline by transforming CRM operations for one of the fastest-growing infrastructure companies in the world. Strategic cross-functional alignment and data governance improvements turned a fragmented sales tech stack into a competitive revenue engine.
$150M+ Pipeline $50M+ Growth 35% Adoption Lift
The Challenge
Cloudflare's rapidly scaling sales organization struggled with fragmented CRM processes, inconsistent data quality, and misaligned forecasting across Finance, Accounting, and Sales Operations teams. The absence of a unified data governance framework created significant friction throughout the revenue lifecycle, undermining forecast confidence and slowing deal execution at a critical growth stage.
My Approach
Implemented a comprehensive Salesforce Sales Cloud optimization strategy centered on workflow automation, data governance frameworks, and cross-functional alignment across Finance, Accounting, and Sales Operations. Drove end-to-end roadmap ownership with phased delivery milestones, continuous stakeholder feedback loops, and a unified data model that became the single source of truth for revenue reporting.
Stakeholders
15+ cross-functional stakeholders including Sales Leadership, Finance Directors, Accounting Managers, Revenue Operations, and SAP Engineering teams.
Tools & Technologies
Salesforce Sales CloudEinstein AnalyticsNetSuite ERPJiraConfluenceTableauData LoaderFlow BuilderApex
Outcomes
$150M+ annual pipeline acceleration • $50M+ enterprise growth • 35% platform adoption increase • 15% faster feature delivery • 30% improved feature adoption • 20% reduction in post-launch defects
Salesforce
Process Optimization: $15M+ Contract Protection
Safeguarded $15M+ in enterprise contract value by leading a strategic roadmap reprioritization and migration execution that kept every critical customer workflow intact. Proactive risk management and real-time stakeholder coordination turned a high-exposure platform transition into a zero-escalation success story.
$15M+ Protected Zero Escalations Seamless Migration
The Challenge
A high-stakes platform migration placed $15M+ in enterprise contract value at risk, with the potential for service disruptions that could erode customer trust at a pivotal renewal period. The initiative demanded precise coordination across technical engineering teams, customer success, and senior business stakeholders under aggressive timelines with zero margin for critical failures.
My Approach
Developed a risk-based roadmap reprioritization framework that identified critical customer workflows, sequenced phased migration timelines to minimize disruption, and established proactive communication channels with enterprise stakeholders. Instituted a dedicated war room process for real-time issue escalation and resolution, ensuring no customer-impacting gaps fell through the cracks during the transition.
Stakeholders
Enterprise Customer Success Managers, Engineering Leadership, Customer Platforms team, Legal/Compliance, and enterprise customers directly involved in the migration.
Tools & Technologies
Customer PlatformsMarketing CloudJiraGainsightTableauSlackMiroConfluence
Outcomes
$15M+ enterprise contract value protected • Zero critical customer escalations during migration • Improved campaign performance metrics • Strengthened enterprise customer trust and retention.
Cloudflare
Fullcast GTM: Territory & Capacity Planning At Scale
Deployed the Fullcast GTM planning platform to bring AI-powered territory optimization and capacity planning to a global sales force of 900+ reps, eliminating the manual chaos that had long plagued annual planning cycles. The result was a repeatable, data-driven planning infrastructure that improved coverage precision and freed Sales Operations to focus on strategic analysis.
900+ Reps Supported 80% Manual Reduction Zero Conflicts
The Challenge
With 900+ sales reps operating across a global team, territory planning and capacity modeling had no systematic foundation — assignments were entirely manual, error-prone, and invisible to leadership until conflicts surfaced. Coverage gaps, account ownership disputes, and suboptimal capacity utilization were persistent pain points that undermined quota attainment and cross-regional collaboration.
My Approach
Led the end-to-end Fullcast implementation with deep integration into Salesforce Sales Cloud, building territory assignment algorithms, capacity models, and scenario planning capabilities from the ground up. Partnered with Sales Operations and Finance leadership to embed data-driven decision-making directly into the annual sales planning cycle, replacing ad hoc spreadsheets with a scalable, auditable planning platform.
Stakeholders
900+ sales reps, Sales Operations, Revenue Operations, Sales Leadership, IT Engineering, and Data Analytics teams across multiple time zones.
Tools & Technologies
FullcastSalesforce Sales CloudEinstein AnalyticsData CloudTableauPythonSQLWorkbench
Outcomes
900+ sales reps supported with automated planning • 80% reduction in manual territory assignment work • Eliminated account conflicts entirely • Improved sales capacity utilization and forecasting accuracy.
AI Innovation
AI Agentforce: Transforming GTM Sales Productivity
Pioneered the adoption of Salesforce Agentforce to bring AI-powered automation into the heart of Cloudflare's GTM motion, reducing manual sales tasks by 25% and enabling reps to focus where it matters most. By translating cutting-edge AI capabilities into practical, rep-facing workflows, this initiative positioned the sales organization at the forefront of intelligent selling.
AI-Powered Routing Predictive Scoring Next-Best-Action
The Challenge
Sales reps were spending a disproportionate share of their time on administrative overhead, manual data entry, and reactive customer engagement rather than on the high-value conversations that drive revenue. Without intelligent automation in the workflow, the team lacked the real-time insights and prioritization signals needed to consistently engage the right accounts at the right moment.
My Approach
Championed Salesforce Agentforce adoption as an early internal advocate, designing AI-powered assistant workflows tailored specifically to Cloudflare's enterprise sales motion. Built and deployed use cases for automated lead routing, intelligent opportunity insights, and predictive next-best-action recommendations — translating emerging AI capabilities into concrete productivity gains for frontline GTM teams.
Stakeholders
Sales Leadership, Sales Operations, IT Engineering, Data Science team, Salesforce Account Team, and GTM Enablement across the global organization.
Tools & Technologies
AgentforceEinstein GPTData CloudSales CloudFlow BuilderApexMuleSoftTableau CRM
Outcomes
25% reduction in manual sales tasks • AI-powered lead routing and scoring deployed • Predictive next-best-action engine launched • Enhanced pipeline visibility and forecasting accuracy
